query:
insert into RequirementHierarchies (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        child_product_id,
                        child_req_id,
                        parent_product_id,
                        parent_req_id
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4,
                        $5
                    )
                    on conflict (child_product_id, child_req_id, parent_product_id, parent_req_id)
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr
